pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh script where they are defined in the instructions, and verifier.py where they are explicitly checked as dictionary keys.
Verified against setup_task.sh where the directory is created and verifier.py which checks for 'Weather_Graphics' in the default_directory preference.
Verified against setup_task.sh instructions and verifier.py which checks if keyword equals 'metar'.
Verified against setup_task.sh instructions and verifier.py which expects 'aviationweather.gov' in the URL field.
Verified against setup_task.sh instructions and verifier.py which checks that startup_urls contain 'radar.weather.gov' and 'star.nesdis.noaa.gov'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated browser environment. It is verified that the expected bookmark folders are 'Live Radar', 'Satellite Imaging', 'Forecast Models', and 'Off-Air'. The target download directory is 'Weather_Graphics'. The custom search engine requires the keyword 'metar' and the URL 'https://aviationweather.gov/data/metar/?id=%s'. The target startup URLs must include 'radar.weather.gov' and 'star.nesdis.noaa.gov'. All metadata claims exactly match the scripts.
